ideas.title: 用可编程物理投影验证坏点条件下的渐进退化
ideas.source: User research profile and system blueprint
ideas.hypothesis: Normalized hardware projection features should degrade more gracefully than raw pixel readout when tactile pixels fail or drift.
ideas.minimum_experiment: Construct 3x3 resistor/tactile array states with 0, 1, 5, 10, and 20 percent equivalent faults; compare raw, software projection, and hardware projection.
success_metrics: R2 between software and hardware projection
ideas.risk: If the real 3x3 sensor is unstable, first validate with precision resistor arrays.
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: Add as P4/P5 bridge only after first resistor-array evidence appears.

ideas.title: 把纹理识别消融转成 ADC 前矢量触觉证据链
ideas.hypothesis: Kx/Ky tangential dynamics provide task-relevant friction cues that z-only or external force-reference channels miss.
ideas.minimum_experiment: Record raw A/B/C/D, hardware Kz/Kx/Ky, z-only, and reference force under matched texture/sliding conditions.
ideas.risk: Without synchronous hardware Kz/Kx/Ky, frame as direction-related feature extraction rather than ADC-front computing.
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: Keep as active Paper A gate.

ideas.title: 用偏移/旋转/接触半径热图证明低离散界面不是只提高灵敏度
ideas.hypothesis: Gradient or non-periodic electrodes plus HCP microstructures reduce response dispersion under assembly and contact perturbations.
ideas.minimum_experiment: Test G1-G5 under controlled shift, rotation, and contact-radius conditions; produce CV, void ratio, and sensitivity maps.
ideas.risk: If only sensitivity improves, downgrade the claim to response dispersion reduction.
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: Accept after at least two tolerance metrics beat controls.

ideas.title: 把论文中的结构机制转成偏移/旋转/接触半径容差地图
ideas.source: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

source_papers.title: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

ideas.hypothesis: 若界面机制真正降低输入离散性，其优势应在装配扰动和接触条件变化下保持，而不只体现在灵敏度。
ideas.minimum_experiment: 在统一载荷下扫描 shift、rotation 与 contact radius，输出 CV、signal-void ratio 和 sensitivity map。
controls: 梯度/非周期电极+常规微结构
ideas.risk: 该 idea 是基于题录/摘要和用户画像生成的可验证假设，需先精读来源论文并做最小实验。
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: 先进入候选池；只有用户在网页中确认并接受画像提案后才写入研究画像。

ideas.title: 把论文的阵列读出策略改写为低冗余 hardware macro-pixel 对照
ideas.source: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

source_papers.title: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

ideas.hypothesis: 可解释的局部矢量/空间投影能以更少读出通道保持边缘、形状和滑移方向信息。
ideas.minimum_experiment: 在同一阵列输入上比较 raw scanning、scalar pooling、software gradient 与 hardware macro-pixel。
ideas.risk: 该 idea 是基于题录/摘要和用户画像生成的可验证假设，需先精读来源论文并做最小实验。
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: 先进入候选池；只有用户在网页中确认并接受画像提案后才写入研究画像。

ideas.title: 把论文的鲁棒/迁移策略加入物理投影坏点渐进退化实验
ideas.source: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

source_papers.title: Vision-based tactile sensing enhanced by microstructures and lightweight convolutional neural network

ideas.hypothesis: 归一化物理投影特征在坏点、漂移和跨器件变化下应比 raw readout 更平滑退化，并减少重标定样本。
ideas.minimum_experiment: 设置 0/1/5/10/20% 等效坏点与增益漂移，比较 raw、software projection、hardware projection 及少样本校准。
ideas.risk: 该 idea 是基于题录/摘要和用户画像生成的可验证假设，需先精读来源论文并做最小实验。
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: 先进入候选池；只有用户在网页中确认并接受画像提案后才写入研究画像。

ideas.title: 把论文机制映射为 3x3 可编程物理触觉投影核
ideas.source: Direct Triboelectric Programming of a Ferroelectric Synaptic Transistor for Neuromorphic Tactile Perception

source_papers.title: Direct Triboelectric Programming of a Ferroelectric Synaptic Transistor for Neuromorphic Tactile Perception

ideas.hypothesis: Ksum/Kx/Ky/Klap/Kring/Kcorner 等可解释投影可在 ADC 前形成，并与软件投影保持一致。
ideas.minimum_experiment: 先用 3x3 精密电阻阵列施加标准图案，再迁移到触觉阵列，比较六类投影核的硬件与软件输出。
ideas.risk: 该 idea 是基于题录/摘要和用户画像生成的可验证假设，需先精读来源论文并做最小实验。
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: 先进入候选池；只有用户在网页中确认并接受画像提案后才写入研究画像。

ideas.title: 把论文系统任务压缩成不拖累主线的最小闭环演示
ideas.source: Mechanical multiaxis force sensor for directly bridging sensing and fluidic actuation

source_papers.title: Mechanical multiaxis force sensor for directly bridging sensing and fluidic actuation

ideas.hypothesis: 一个受控的纹理/滑移/抓取演示足以证明前端特征的任务价值，无需把主张扩展成完整机器人系统。
ideas.minimum_experiment: 选择单一任务，固定机械输入和后端分类器，只消融 raw、z-only 与前端矢量/投影特征。
ideas.risk: 该 idea 是基于题录/摘要和用户画像生成的可验证假设，需先精读来源论文并做最小实验。
ideas.profile_update_recommendation: 先进入候选池；只有用户在网页中确认并接受画像提案后才写入研究画像。
